message:
viz: search palette, clustering, analytics, tests (bd-24q.9.2/9.3/9.4/14.2)

- Cmd/Ctrl+K search palette with debounced worker queries, keyboard
  navigation (ArrowUp/Down/Enter/Esc), overlay dismiss, result click
- Deterministic threshold clustering: LSH banding + Union-Find single-linkage,
  stable cluster IDs (FNV-1a), medoid selection, TF-DF theme tags
- First-introduced analytics: earliest commit with token in added lines
- Most-edited sections: per-heading edit mass with peak burst detection
- ~45 async unit tests covering tokenizer, index, first-introduced,
  most-edited, palette UI, and clustering correctness
- Include other agents' e2e scaffolding and Cargo.lock updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@ +{ + "name": "frankensqlite", + "version": "1.0.0", + "description": "
", + "main": "index.js", + "directories": { + "doc": "docs", + "test": "tests" + }, + "scripts": { + "test": "echo \"Error: no test specified\" && exit 1" + }, + "repository": { + "type": "git", + "url": "git+https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite.git" + }, + "keywords": [], + "author": "", + "license": "ISC", + "type": "commonjs", + "bugs": { + "url": "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite/issues" + }, + "homepage": "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite#readme", + "devDependencies": { + "@playwright/test": "^1.58.2" + } +}

@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+import { defineConfig, devices } from "@playwright/test";
+
+export default defineConfig({
+  testDir: "./e2e",
+  timeout: 60_000,
+  retries: 1,
+  outputDir: "test-results/artifacts",
+  reporter: [
+    ["html", { outputFolder: "test-results/html-report", open: "never" }],
+    ["json", { outputFile: "test-results/results.json" }],
+    ["list"],
+  ],
+  use: {
+    baseURL: "https://frankensqlite.com",
+    trace: "retain-on-failure",
+    screenshot: "on",
+    video: "retain-on-failure",
+    actionTimeout: 15_000,
+    navigationTimeout: 30_000,
+  },
+  projects: [
+    {
+      name: "desktop-chrome",
+      use: { ...devices["Desktop Chrome"] },
+    },
+    {
+      name: "mobile-chrome",
+      use: { ...devices["Pixel 5"] },
+    },
+  ],
+});
